keyRules: A maximum of 120 m above ground level (EASA Open Category)
Register as a UAS operator (€10/year) if your drone weighs 250 g or more or is equipped with a camera
Mandatory A1/A3 online training – minimum age 16
Civil liability insurance is mandatory for drones weighing more than 20 kg
Do not fly over assemblies of people. Rules for uninvolved persons depend on subcategory, class mark and operating conditions; check the official matrix.
At least 5 km away from any airport or airfield
Night flight is permitted under the EASA open-category baseline when the required green flashing light is used, unless a current geographic zone or national rule imposes a stricter condition.
Restrictions are in effect in the Curonian Spit National Park
Additional restrictions in border areas with Russia and Belarus
importantNotes: Registration costs €10 per year—it must be renewed annually
Insurance is required only for drones weighing more than 20 kg
Flight restrictions are in effect in the border areas with Russia and Belarus
The Vilnius Airport CTR covers a large part of the city
The GDPR applies when identifiable individuals are filmed or photographed

fields.disclaimerText: Before flying, always check the official TKA sources and UTM Lithuania. This app is a tool—not a legal authority. Lithuania follows EASA regulations with national additions.
